name: MilestoneContractManager

ironRules.rule: CONTRACT_IMMUTABLE_FIELDS = [clientId, contractTotal, gigId, freelancerId] — compile-time constant. NEVER a database lookup. Any immutable field write rejected at ORDER 1 with no storage attempt.
ContractFieldImmutable emitted immediately on immutable field rejection at ORDER 1.
Sum validation at ORDER 2 — milestones.reduce(sum) must equal contractTotal exactly. MilestoneSumMismatch emitted on failure.
storeDocumentWithOCC — not plain storeDocument. OCC_CONFLICT → emit ContractUpdateConflict.
storeDocument(audit) at ORDER 4 BEFORE FreelancerContractActivated emit. DNA-8.

keywords: milestone contract manager CONTRACT_IMMUTABLE_FIELDS sum validation OCC FreelancerContractActivated ContractFieldImmutable MilestoneSumMismatch T614 freelancer marketplace
